text.title: Audit-Grade API Design Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply Audit-Grade API Design. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: define-contracts
step.action: Write request/response shapes per endpoint; pin in OpenAPI.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: design-error-taxonomy
step.action: Define error codes, retryability, idempotency tokens.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: pin-auth-and-limits
step.action: Document auth scopes, rate limits per scope, burst rules.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: design-pagination-and-versioning
step.action: Document cursor pagination, versioning header, sunset policy.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: write-deprecation-policy
step.action: Codify how breaking changes are announced and timed.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
